pain.eyebrow: The Reality You Need To Know
pain.title: Why You Must Own Your Own Digital Presence
pain.subtitle: Selling only on marketplaces, social media, or someone else's platform means playing on land that can be taken away at any moment.
pain.bridge: It's time to own your own digital home.

items.title: Marketplace Fees Keep Choking Your Margin
items.desc: It started at 2%, now it's 10–15% — plus shipping, paid ads, and vouchers you cover. You sell harder while your margin quietly erodes.

items.title: Algorithms Change — Your Store Can Go Quiet Overnight
items.desc: One algorithm update on Shopee, TikTok, or Instagram can crash your traffic overnight. You have zero control over it.

items.title: Tighter Regulations — A Legal Business Needs a Digital Identity
items.desc: Licensing, digital taxes, and B2B tenders increasingly require an official online presence. Without a website, you're hard to trust formally.

items.title: Your Customer Data Belongs to the Marketplace, Not You
items.desc: On marketplaces you don't know who your buyers are, can't follow up, and can't build loyalty. They hold the data — not you.

about.title: Where Javanese Soul Meets World-Class Technology.
about.intro: Digiwangsa is a digital studio born from a simple belief: technology should carry meaning. We blend the depth of Javanese heritage — patience, craft, and harmony — with the precision of modern web engineering.
about.story: The name “Digiwangsa” unites the digital era with “wangsa” — a dynasty, a lineage. We build digital legacies: websites and applications meant to last, to represent, and to grow with you. Like a wayang performance, every project we craft tells a story, with care behind every detail.

values.name: Craft Over Templates
values.desc: Every project is built bespoke — designed around your identity, never copy-pasted.

values.name: Meaning & Purpose
values.desc: Beautiful is the baseline. We design for outcomes that matter to your business.

values.name: Partnership
values.desc: We work with you, not just for you — transparent, collaborative, and honest.

values.name: Lasting Quality
values.desc: Clean code and timeless design, built to perform and endure.
